g.text: Database is consistent and ready for queries.

g.text: | Crash Point | Journal State | DB State | Recovery Action |
| Pre-journal-fsync | Partial | Untouched | Delete partial journal |
| Mid-DB-write | Complete | Inconsistent | Replay → Restore originals |
| Post-DB-fsync | Complete | Committed | Replay → Idempotent restore |
